title: ElNet VIP Meter | Control Applications
content_html:
ElNet VIP General electricity measurements

Three-phase meter.
Allows display of three-phase voltages.
Allows display of three-phase currents.
Enables the display of three-phase suppliers.
Allows three-phase power factor display.
Allows peak display of voltage, current and power factor.
Allows detection of lack of phase and order of phases.
Measurement accuracy 0.5%.
Sophisticated and illuminated LCD display.
LED indication for each phase.

Simple and easy panel installation.

Related products
